title: Interface Define
description: Create a reusable blueprint for object structures using the interface keyword to ensure consistency.
problemStatement:
Object patterns! Define an interface named `User` with a `username` (string) and an `email` (string).

**Requirement:** Create a constant named `myUser` that conforms to this interface.
hints: Interfaces are the primary way to define the 'shape' of an object in TypeScript.
expectedOutput: A User object with correct properties
